description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Checks that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: test, check, and coveralls_finish. The test job runs on multiple OS and Python versions, checking out the code, setting up Python, and running tests. The check job runs on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, setting up Python, running unit tests with coverage, and linting with flake8 and mypy. The coveralls_finish job depends on the check job and finishes the Coveralls report.
